programs.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programs.sub_title: Return of the Salem Witch Trial House
programs.desc: Jon and Kristina are back at the John Proctor house after a devastating pipe break wreaks havoc on the home's first floor. After tackling the mold, they work with elements of home's history to create a modern design while embracing its historic past.

programs.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programs.desc: A clam shack once residing on a nearby island was transformed into a home; Jon and Kristina come to the rescue and pull from its seaside history to create a bright space that's perfect for humans and felines alike.

programs.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programs.desc: An Olympic medalist bought what turned out to be a bad flip, and now after several DIY attempts, she's calling on Jasmine to help; Jasmine has $175,000 to bring this lemon back to life, all while juggling motherhood and her new business in Utah.

programs.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programs.sub_title: Help! We Bought a House as Is!
programs.desc: A couple returns to Utah to be near their blended family, but a health scare and a half-gutted fixer-upper puts their dream home on hold; Jasmine steps in to rescue the project and create the safe, welcoming home they've been dreaming of.

programs.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programs.desc: A couple has taken their property on a wild ride, and for the second time, they want to convert their duplex into a single-family home; Jasmine aims to rescue the project and turn it into the dream home they've been chasing.

programs.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programs.desc: Jasmine returns to help a couple convert their duplex into a single-family home; with just eight weeks left on the clock and the kitchen and kids' rooms in chaos, Jasmine races to deliver a dream home before time and money run out.
